query:
SELECT 
  projectId,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bulletPoints IS NOT NULL AND bulletPoints != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bp,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlySalesHistory IS NOT NULL AND monthlySalesHistory != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hist,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NOT NULL AND price > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parentAsin IS NOT NULL AND parentAsin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_parent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fbaFee IS NOT NULL AND fbaFee != '' AND fbaFee != '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fba
FROM dev_products 
GROUP BY projectId;

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bulletPoints IS NOT NULL AND bulletPoints != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bp,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlySalesHistory IS NOT NULL AND monthlySalesHistory != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hist,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NOT NULL AND price > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parentAsin IS NOT NULL AND parentAsin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_parent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fbaFee IS NOT NULL AND fbaFee != '' AND fbaFee != '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fba
FROM dev_products 
GROUP BY projectId;
